[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 10/24 (Tue)!

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 10/24 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 10/31 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
